title: Zcraft Decoration
description: A Minecraft decoration mod focused on post-apocalyptic and abandoned props, featuring simple block-based models with detailed textures for immersive world building.
body:
# ☢️ ZCraft: Zone Decor

**ZCraft: Zone Decor** is a decoration-focused Minecraft mod that adds a large collection of post-apocalyptic and abandoned props for immersive world-building. 

Designed specifically for builders and modpack creators who want a strong atmosphere, consistent visual style, and clean performance. It is perfect for wasteland, survival, ruined city, and **S.T.A.L.K.E.R.-style** builds.

---

## 🛠️ Key Features & Props

The mod introduces a variety of highly detailed environmental props suited for ruined landscapes:
* **Military & Survival Gear:** Military crates, supply boxes, and tactical props.
* **Industrial Clutter:** Fuel barrels, discarded tires, and industrial debris.
* **Abandoned Electronics:** Damaged household appliances and ruined tech.
* **Environmental Decor:** General waste, rusted structures, and post-apocalyptic environmental props.

---

## 🌍 Join the Official S.T.A.L.K.E.R. Server! [Discord](https://discord.gg/GY4xS9gBqd)

Looking for a place to experience these assets in action? I’m hosting a dedicated, full-scale **S.T.A.L.K.E.R.-style Minecraft server**!

* **Hardcore Survival RPG:** Inspired directly by the legendary S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe.
* **The Zone Experience:** Features high-risk scavenging, deadly radiation zones, dangerous anomalies, and hostile mutants.
* **Factions & Economy:** Join player-run factions, fight for territory, and survive the harsh economy.

> ⚠️ *This isn’t vanilla with a skin slapped on it. Every system is built around survival, risk, and pure atmosphere. If you know STALKER, you’ll understand immediately. If you don’t... the Zone will teach you fast.*
